## Variable importance (random forest)

- **`vip`** on a fitted **`ranger`** model: how often splits use each **baked** predictor (impurity).
- **Correlated** bill measures can **share** importance — not proof that changing one bill mm **causes** species shift.

```{r}
#| label: day04-vip-prep
#| echo: false
#| results: hide
rf_fit <- fit(wf_rf, peng_cls)
```

```{r}
#| label: day04-vip-plot
#| echo: true
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 5
rf_fit |>
  extract_fit_parsnip() |>
  vip(geom = "point", num_features = 12) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Variable importance (random forest)",
    subtitle = "Adelie vs Gentoo — descriptive ranking, not causal"
  )
```

**Model-agnostic alternative:** **permutation importance** (shuffle one column, watch metric drop) — see [Module 06](../modules/module-06-evaluation-and-interpretability.qmd).

**Local explanations:** SHAP (TreeSHAP for forests) — same module; treat as **communication**, not intervention.
